step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: In this paper, the dynamic responses of the EMB are simulated by Ansoft Maxwell
3-D structure can be simplified into a 2-D structure for analysis, which discretizes the structure with triangular elements... mesh density of the inner cylinder is increased
time nodes of the damping force peak obtained by FEM are consistent with the experimental results

issues.claim: time nodes of damping force peak obtained by FEM are consistent with experimental results
issues.reason: This observation is technically the result of Step 2 (Validation/Impact tests, p4), not Step 1 (Modeling, p3). Step 1 should only claim FEM data generation.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Modify observation to state 'FEM model constructed and dynamic responses simulated' and move consistency claim to Step 2.

evidence.quote: A high-speed camera is used to measure the buffer displacement. A force sensor is used to measure the damping force.
a total of four impact tests under four different loads are carried out
simulation model can correctly characterize the dynamic responses of EMB
the Chebyshev polynomial expansion is formulated to convert the cost functions... into explicit expressions
third-order Chebyshev polynomial is chosen... generate 168 sampling points... optimal Latin hypercube method
Chebyshev polynomial expansion [48–51]... balancing the expansion accuracy and computation burden [54]
Using the affine arithmetic, the uncertainty quantity is re-written into affine form
thickness of the outer tube u1 and u2 are set as uncertain parameters... noise symbol whose value is uncertain but lies in [-1, 1]
worst-case scenario of the cost function can be directly obtained... avoids the double-loop nested optimization
Tang and Zhang [41, 42] proposed an iterative Nash equilibrium algorithm
sequential quadratic programming (SQP) is employed as the optimizer... after 8 iterations, the results... are consistent
Nishimura et al. [38] studied the Nash game problem with uncertainty and defined the robust Nash equilibrium
the double-loop approach is used to solve the robust Nash equilibrium
computation time of the double-loop approach is 28.60 s; in sharp contrast, the proposed approach only needs 1.38 s
Aghassi and Bertsimas [32] presented a robust matrix game with reference to the worst-case analysis method
uncertain parameters that take the nominal values are used to reconstruct the EMB model
first peak Fe_max drops from 356 to 330 kN and the second peak Ff_max drops from 356 to 331 kN... eddy current density is declined... a decrease of 59.42%
